name: node-progress
description: Progress Tracker — a Node on GROUNDED. A single accountability dashboard of what each reporter is publishing across every channel, plus how those posts perform.
comment_dependencies: The runtime provides BOTH entrypoints (createServer local, createHostedServer online) and all their deps (express/multer/anthropic + lazy pg/cookie-parser/jsonwebtoken). Progress Tracker adds nothing of its own — reporters log output, an AI parser turns free-text daily reports into entries, and the dashboard aggregates everything in JS.
